name: D-3 / Krasnovgardeyets
events: Under command of Kpt-Ltn.F.V.Konstantinov ,later Kpt.3rank M.A.Bibeev 8 war patrols (138 days total) , 12 attacks used 32 torpedoed (1)
19 Aug 1941 Around 2300 hours D-3 attacked a German convoy of the Persfjord without result.
26 Sep 1941 Around 1130 hours D-3 attacked a merchant of the Kongsfjord without result.
27 Sep 1941 Around 1200 hours D-3 attacked a merchant of the Tanafjord without result.
30 Sep 1941 Around 1400 hours D-3 attacked a merchant of the Tanafjord without result.
11 Oct 1941 Around 1430 hours D-3 attacked a merchant of the Kongsfjord without result.
28 Nov 1941 Around 1400 hours D-3 attacked a German convoy of the Porsangerfjord in position 70°54'N, 26°15'E without result.
5 Dec 1941 Around 1300 hours D-3 attacked a German convoy of the Kongsfjord in position 70°59'N, 26°36'E. The German merchant Leuna (6856 GRT) is missed by the torpedoes fired.
6 Dec 1941 Around 1400 hours D-3 attacked a German convoy of the Laksfjord. The Norwegian merchants Moshill (2959 GRT) and Ringar (5013 GRT, both offsite links) are missed by the torpedoes fired.

14 Mar 1942 Around 1340 hours D-3 attacked the German auxiliary minesweeper M 1504 of the Tanafjord. The torpedoes fired missed their target and D-3 is counter-attacked by the German auxiliary anti-submarine trawlers UJ 1108 and UJ 1109.
2 May 1942 Around 2115 hours D-3 attacks the a German convoy off Harbaken, Norway. The torpedoes fired missed the German merchant Iris (3232 GRT).
16 May 1942 Around 1220 hours D-3 attacked a German convoy of the Bosfjord without result.
17 May 1942 Around 1445 hours D-3 attacked a German convoy off Makkaur, Norway. The Norwegian merchant Hallingdal (3180 G~ GRT, offsite link) is missed by the torpedoes fired.

10 Jun 1942 D-3 Krasnogvardeets [not Krasnovgardeyets!] was lost after 06 June, 1942. Possible reasons of loss - mine field "Bantos-A" north to Rybachy peninsula or mine field "Schpeer III" off Berlevog. (1)
